🧭

TripLens

the whole trip, planned — flights · hotels · lounges · deals · the smart card to pay

Where to?

Tap a place and I'll build you a trip — day-by-day ideas, real map searches, the best card to pay with. Change anything after. No sign-up, no fake prices.

My Trips

Save a plan, then build it out day by day — flights, lounges, hotel, food and things to do, all on a timeline. Add a packing checklist. Everything saved on this device; export to share with whoever's travelling with you.

➕ Start a new trip

I'll seed day 1 with your flight + lounge + hotel check-in, and the last day with checkout + return. You edit freely from there.

📲 Open a shared trip

Someone sent you a trip file? Import it here — it's added to your trips.

Hotels — best site, best card

Pick your city and dates. I line up every booking site (compare-first), open the live search there, and flag which of your cards has an offer. Real rates stay on the real sites — I never invent a price.

🏨 Hotel money-saving plays

Trains & buses — and is it even worth flying?

Put in your two cities and I work out the real distance, then tell you honestly whether to take a train, a bus, or fly. I open the live search on every booking site for your route. Real fares and timetables stay on the real sites — I never invent a price.

🎟️ Train & bus money-saving plays

Where to? — let the trip find you

Not sure where to go? Tell me where you're starting and what matters, and I'll rank real destinations on facts I can prove — how far, fly or train, and how many lounges your cards actually open there. Then open the live search to see the real price. No invented fares, no fake "from ₹X".

Multi-city trip — chain your stops

Add every city on your trip in order. For each leg I work out the real distance and the honest best way to get there (fly, train or bus), then open the live search for each one. No invented fares — the real prices live on the booking sites.

Long weekends — take 1 day off, get 4

For each holiday I work out the break you already get with zero leave, and the smartest 1-2 days off that stretch it into a proper getaway. Then plan a trip straight onto those dates.

Movable festivals (Diwali, Holi, Eid...) change every year and by state, so I don't guess them. Add yours from your official holiday list and the same math runs on it.

On-trip essentials & local deals

Everything for while you're there — cabs, intercity travel, eSIM and forex, dining and things to do — each with the live app/site and the card or coupon that cuts the bill. Pick a city to tailor the links.

💱 Currency converter live ECB rates
✈️ India flight deals + best way to pay

Find the fare,
pay the smart way.

Real fares, pulled live, for free. Connect a free flight-data key once and I fetch actual prices across airlines right here. I also line up every airline and booking site with the best card/app/coupon discount for your wallet. I never make a price up.

Where to?

Pick your route and date. Get live fares, then every booking site with the best discount for your wallet.

⚡ Connect free live fares (one-time, 2 min)

Live airline fares come from Amadeus, a real flight-data provider with a free tier. A free static site like this can't scrape MakeMyTrip or IndiGo directly (they block bots), but Amadeus lets your browser fetch real fares with no server. Your key is stored only on this device and only ever sent to Amadeus.

  1. Open developers.amadeus.com/register and sign up (free, no card).
  2. Create an app in Self-Service → copy your API Key and API Secret.
  3. Paste them below. Keep environment on Test to start (free, sample inventory). Switch to Production once you add a card on Amadeus for real fares.

Coupons & offers

Card discounts, app-only fares, wallet stacking and coupon mechanisms that recur on India flight sites. Each is tagged how sure I am and when it was last checked — tap verify to confirm today's exact code before you pay.

🛋 India's lounge wallet

Every lounge your cards
actually open.

Airport and railway, all of India. Tell me your cities and the cards in your wallet — I'll show exactly which lounge each one opens, how many visits you have left, and which card to get next.

Where are you flying?

Tell me your cities. I'll show exactly which lounges you can walk into, and which card to flash at each one.

🏠
Your cards
Reality check: India reworked lounge rules across 2024-25 and they shift every quarter. Each entry shows a confidence badge. Green = a card of yours opens it now. Amber = you have a card but a spend gate or empty quota blocks it.

Which card should you get?

Ranked by new lounges it unlocks for you, how easy it is to get, and how fast it arrives — important if you're applying before a trip.

Tap the cards you hold

Saved only in this browser. Nothing leaves your device, ever.

How much should you trust this?

This app knows its own data goes stale. Here it checks itself, ages its confidence, learns from what actually happened to you, and tells you what to re-verify before you fly.

Honest scope: LoungeLens is a free, private app with no server, so it can't browse the live internet by itself (your browser blocks that, and there's nothing running when the tab is closed). What it CAN do, and does below: track data age, audit itself, learn from your logged visits, and queue what needs a human check. Real-time auto-research needs a paid backend — see the roadmap at the bottom.
🔁 Verify before you fly

Ranked by urgency: things your own experience contradicted, then items on your trip, then the stalest / least certain.

🧪 Self-audit (the app checking its own data)
📥 Community data (share corrections)

Export your logged experiences to share with friends, or import theirs. This is how the data improves without a server.

➕ Suggest a missing lounge or card

Spotted a lounge or card we don't list? Add it. It shows in your app right away and you can export it to share so it gets verified into the main data.

🪜 The roadmap to real-time (honest)

Your India coverage map

Every state, colored by how much of its lounge access your cards actually unlock. Tap a state to see its lounges and which card walks you in.

Lounges by airport & station

Pick a place. See every lounge there and which of your cards walks you in. Unlike other finders, this one knows your wallet.

Compare two cards

Pick two. See who wins on lounge coverage, visits, ease, spend gates and railway — head to head.

vs

Is the fee worth it?

Tell me how often you fly and what a lounge is worth to you. I'll tell you if a card's fee pays for itself — for every card.

A lounge visit is usually worth ₹800-₹2000 to most people (food + a quiet seat + wifi). Adjust to your taste.

Your profile

Free and private. There's no server and no password — your stuff is saved on this device, and a sync code carries it to your other devices.

👤 Name

Optional. Just so it feels like yours.

📲 Move to another device

Generate a sync code here, paste it on your other phone/laptop, and your cards, visits and trip come along. Or use a file backup.

Restore on this device

Paste a sync code from your other device, or import a backup file. This MERGES (it won't wipe what's already here).

Why no real login?

Real accounts need a paid server that stores your data — which also makes whoever runs it responsible for protecting it (sensitive: it's about which cards you hold). LoungeLens stays free and private by keeping everything on your own device and letting YOU carry it with a code. Treat the code like the data itself: don't post it publicly.

About TripLens

A free, private app for the whole trip — flights, hotels, airport lounges, cabs and local deals — with the smartest card to pay on every booking. India-first.

⚠️ Not financial advice

TripLens helps you plan travel and understand which cards help you pay less. It does not recommend taking on debt and is not affiliated with any bank, card issuer, airline, hotel, OTA, DreamFolks, Priority Pass, or any lounge operator. Travel prices and card/lounge rules in India change often. Always confirm the current price and terms on the booking site and with your bank before you rely on them. Apply for credit cards responsibly.

🔒 Your privacy

Everything you enter — your cards, your visits, your trips — is stored only in your own browser (localStorage). It is never sent to any server. There is no account, no login, no tracking, no analytics, no cookies. If you clear your browser data, it's gone. If you open the app on another device, it starts fresh. You can export your data to a file any time from the Data Health tab.

📊 Where the data comes from

The card and lounge information is compiled and confidence-tagged by the maintainer, last reviewed on the date shown in the footer. It is directionally accurate but not guaranteed current. Each entry carries a confidence badge and a "verify" pointer. The app ages its own confidence over time and flags what to re-check. Treat it as a smart starting point, not the final word.

💬 Found something wrong?

Lounge access changed? A card's benefit is different now? Log your real experience in the Lounges tab (got in / refused) — that feeds the verify queue and, if you export and share the file, helps everyone using the app. That's how the data stays honest without a server.

Version

—

🧭

Welcome to TripLens

One app for the whole trip. Three quick things:

  1. Add the cards you hold — tap them once, saved on this device.
  2. Plan a trip — type where you're going, get flights, hotels, lounges and local deals in one plan.
  3. Pay the smart way — I flag the single best card to swipe on every booking.

Free. Private. Nothing leaves your device. No fake prices. Not financial advice.

👤

Log in

Saves your cards and preferences. Free, no email needed.
